---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a bounded improvement for ZeroandZero
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or developer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest meaningful improvement you have in mind.

## Why It Fits

Explain how the idea fits the project's architecture and safety model.

## Constraints To Respect

Call out any boundaries this idea must preserve, such as:
- no secrets or private operating state in repo
- no weakening of approval or trading safeguards
- no accidental source-of-truth ambiguity

## Extra Context

Links, sketches, references, or prior art.
